title: Retro Mario Worlds
description: Biomes, enemies, and power-ups from old Super Mario games in Minecraft
body:
Retro Mario Worlds is a mod that recreates the worlds of the retro games in the Super Mario series, adding biomes, enemies, blocks, and power-ups.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HHAoLNNU6a4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod adds:

From the game SUPER MARIO BROS 3: 50% done

- A Dimension with its 7 biomes + extra
- ![world 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e45628e8470f959800f10f4597b747a5dbf92534.png)
- ![world 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43897aa0c12e22ea60209c9ec27c7be880aef9c3.png)
- ![world 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0895a19764a75954e0ba711e5bd15aeca412f5ec.png)
- ![world 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27760c13af0be035cc6c1f964758a72632bc39ac.png)
- ![world 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/463e98fc418742fa72294784ec72d0bcd6748655.png)
- ![world 6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e8e087310a7409643bfba3b80252fe8ea5c99a.png)
- ![world 7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c82041fe239461814c88fe713123c3dd82d0e8b.png)
- Variety of enemies and a Mini boss
- ![Fortress boss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b795ffc3fe7589982bfcfe5d568d1953ced797.png)
- 3 power-ups and tools
- ![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33556dd516ea3005d3daa63a99e5c2f688d70eef.png)
- Warp Whistle It transports you to the world of Super Mario Bros. 3
- ![warpwhistle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c53a889c510924cf9c072c788414065e3428033a.png)
- Return Whistle Returns you to the overworld
- ![returnwhistle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/336eec0e249f4a6d8e5633525e2cecb886895459.png)
- Pipe Linker works to connect two teleportation pipes
- ![pipe linker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b046798dbdd7d8c1b3913f90588203755b1be7e0.png)
- A Variety of standard, functional, and decorative blocks
- ![functional blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/674db3517c8112a8f16a2ff19c5589f60c5fa133.png)
- ![decoration blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a0f99317535303198212a01c0ce628798d3bdca.png)
- ![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11606f36fbd9f9c42931439a43cb46079d993d73.png)

From the game SUPER MARIO WORLD: 0% done

I will add it in a future update.



- This mod is made out of love for the classic Super Mario games. The textures and sounds are generally the property of Nintendo; I am only recreating them in Minecraft.



- The mod may have bugs or errors that I will fix as I update it.

- This mod requires the following mods to function properly: Geckolib and Fusion (Connected Textures)

Here are the direct links: 

[Fusion Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures/version/1.2.7b-forge-mc1.20.1)

[Geckolib Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/4.2.1)
